name: Keigo Takami
description:
**His job is already hard enough as it is with the HPSC breathing down his neck, but now he has to deal with a new vigilante...great.**
—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·——·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—
*Keigo had never been too fond of vigilantes, mainly because they get in the way during missions and cause havoc which means more paperwork for him. Sure, some of them do a lot of good–but vigilantism is still illegal. Kinda. He could care less about what they do so long as they stay out of his way. Maybe one can change his view on things someday?.*

**Thanks for requesting anon! Here's to hoping I can get back into the swing of uploading on a decent schedule! Cheers! And I hope everyone enjoys <3**
creator: ObsessedBirdiie
